utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (6 total). The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully detailed: 
1) property — includes type, location, status, estimated_price, and features, fulfilling the 'selected property with details and price' requirement. 
2) financing — includes type, interest rate, amortization period, down payment, loan amount, and monthly payment estimate, satisfying 'financing solution with terms'. 
3) legal_services — includes description, status, estimated_cost, includes breakdown, and timeline, covering 'legal services with costs'. 
4) moving_services — includes description, status, estimated_cost, includes breakdown, and timeline, meeting 'moving arrangements with costs'. 
5) setup_services — includes description and details for utilities and internet setup with costs, fulfilling 'utility and setup services'. 
6) total_budget — includes full cost breakdown with property price, down payment, loan, legal fees, moving cost, utility setup, total upfront cost, and monthly costs, fully matching 'complete cost breakdown'. All six elements are present and fully specified.
